description: Toggle nodal mixed discretization (NMD) for zones in the specified range. NMD is used for plasticity calculations when on . This provides a more accurate solution for tetrahedral meshes. The default is off . See Nodal Mixed Discretization in the 3DEC Theory section.

keywords.name: volume-minimum
keywords.description: Zones with volumes under value f will be excluded from nodal mixed discretization calculation. The default is 0.0.

keywords.name: volume-minimum-ratio
keywords.description: Zones with an inner/outer sphere volume ratio under the value f will be excluded from nodal mixed discretization calculation. The default is 0.001.

keywords.name: join
keywords.description: Setting to on will perform nodal mixed discretization across joined block boundaries. The default is off .
